name: District 08
description_short: District 08 Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union in Alexandria, Louisiana offering loans, debit cards, online banking, and credit cards to local members.
description_long:
District 08 Federal Credit Union (District 08 FCU) is a federally chartered, member-owned credit union serving the Alexandria, Louisiana community. Founded as a cooperative financial institution, the credit union operates on a not-for-profit basis, meaning earnings are returned to members rather than external shareholders. The organization is headquartered at 3300 South MacArthur Drive in Alexandria and maintains traditional business hours Monday through Friday from 7:45 AM to 4:00 PM.

District 08 FCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial services designed for personal and member needs. These include vehicle financing across multiple categories (autos, boats, motorcycles, RVs, powersports, and golf carts), credit cards that support the credit union's mission, debit card services, online banking with secure login capabilities, check reordering, and various loan products. The credit union actively promotes competitive loan rates and positions itself as willing to match rates offered by other lenders. Members can access rewards through the CU Perks shopping program and utilize emergency debit card replacement services.

District 08 FCU distinguishes itself through personalized member service, emphasizing direct contact before members finalize loans elsewhere. The credit union's new credit card program (launched July 1st) is marketed as unique for supporting the credit union family while providing traditional credit card benefits. Their vehicle financing tool accommodates diverse vehicle types, indicating broader lending flexibility than typical banks. The organization maintains traditional local banking relationships rather than operating as a purely digital institution.

As a credit union, District 08 FCU serves member-owners and is regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), providing deposit insurance up to $250,000. However, membership eligibility requirements likely restrict access to specific communities or groups. The website provides limited detail on loan terms, specific rates, membership requirements, or fee structures, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly. Service availability appears limited to traditional business hours without evident 24/7 digital options mentioned.
services: Vehicle financing (autos, boats, motorcycles, RVs, powersports, golf carts) with new and used options
Credit card products with rewards capability (launched July 1st)
Debit card services with emergency replacement (1-800-543-5073)
Online banking with secure login and password recovery
Share accounts and savings products (standard credit union accounts)
Loan products with competitive rate matching
Personal contact lending consultation before loan approval elsewhere
pros: Member-owned not-for-profit structure returns earnings to members rather than external shareholders
NCUA-insured deposits provide up to $250,000 protection per member account
Competitive loan rate matching policy — credit union explicitly states willingness to match other lenders' rates
Diverse vehicle financing options including boats, RVs, motorcycles, and powersports in addition to traditional autos
CU Perks rewards program allows members to earn money while shopping
New credit card product (as of July 2025) designed specifically to support credit union members
Established local institution with 40+ years of community presence in Alexandria, Louisiana
cons: Limited geographic accessibility — membership likely restricted to specific communities or employee groups, requiring verification of eligibility
Minimal digital availability — no 24/7 online services evident; traditional business hours (7:45 AM-4:00 PM weekdays only) restrict member access
Website lacks critical loan details including APR ranges, terms, fees, or membership requirements, forcing members to call for basic information
No mention of alternative lending products like personal loans, debt consolidation, or credit building services beyond basic credit cards
Limited customer service channels — only phone contact methods listed; no live chat, email support, or mobile app information provided
best_for: Alexandria, Louisiana residents or employees with specific employer/community eligibility for membership
Vehicle buyers seeking competitive auto, boat, RV, or specialty vehicle financing from a mission-driven lender
Members prioritizing locally-owned financial institutions over national banks or online-only lenders
Consumers interested in supporting a not-for-profit financial cooperative while accessing basic banking and loan services
diagnosis: District 08 FCU is best for Alexandria-area residents or eligible members seeking a community-focused alternative to traditional banks, particularly for vehicle financing and basic banking services. The main caveat is strict membership eligibility requirements and limited digital accessibility—prospective members must verify eligibility and contact the credit union directly for loan terms, rates, and fees not disclosed on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
